title: Day 1 Session 1, Panel Discussion
description:
Session I. New devices and high throughput acquisitions
Session I of the ODIN Symposium was focused on new devices and high throughput acquisitions. This session will featured talks by leading experts in the field. The talks covered both electrical and optical recordings of brain activity at high spatiotemporal resolution. The session concluded with a discussion on the future of high throughput neuroscience.

Panelists/Speakers: Shadi Dayeh, Tim Harris, Adam Cohen, Alipasha Vaziri
Moderator: Ben Dichter
